name: StableUpload
description: Pay-per-upload file hosting. Upload files, get a link. Support for static site hosting with automatic extraction from zip files.

endpoints.description: Buy an upload slot and receive a signed URL to upload your file. Files are hosted permanently and accessible via public link
Buy a site upload slot. Upload a zip file, then activate to extract and serve as a static site
Renew a static site for count × 6 months. Price = tier price × count

note: StableUpload provides instant file and static site hosting via x402. Features: (1) File Upload - $2 per file with permanent hosting and public link, (2) Static Site Hosting - $2 to deploy a zip file as a static website, (3) Site Renewal - $20 per 6-month extension. No account required - authenticate with x402 payment. Ideal for AI agents that need to host files, images, or deploy static web applications on-demand.
